name: Quiche Lorraine
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle bacon, cheese and onion in the bottom of the frozen pie shell.
2. Beat together eggs, cream and seasonings.
3. Pour egg mixture into pie shell.
4. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 15 minutes on the bottom shelf.
5. Reduce temperature to 325°F and continue baking for 20 minutes or until knife inserted comes out clean.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
